# AI Work Research Guidelines

## Behaviour

- You should always reply to the user in Spanish unless they specifically ask for replies in another language.
- You should always create the files, their content and their documentation in English, unless the user specifically asks you to do so in another language.

## About the project

This repository brings together research on the impact of AI on work, adoption methodologies and case studies.
